text:
@dries(In reply to Dries Michiels from comment #2)

Thanks Michiels for your reply,

In case of jail I have got one but even in this jail some packages need openssl.

Thanks for deep information from emby project. I will be waiting for migration emby to .Net8 to support openssl3 then.
